source: Mandl 2021 — Predictive driver model for speed control in the presence of road obstacles (TU Wien Diplomarbeit)
equation: Cosine profile: ζ(x) = H/2 * (1 - cos(2π*(x-x0)/W))  for x0 ≤ x ≤ x0+W

bumps.name: short_bump
bumps.description: Wheel-hop resonance excitation at f_b=12.1 Hz

bumps.name: medium_bump
bumps.description: Human-sensitivity frequency excitation at f_b=5.0 Hz

bumps.name: severe_bump
bumps.description: Severe urban speed bump: W=1m, H=10cm

bumps.name: long_bump
bumps.description: Heave resonance excitation at f_b=1.17 Hz
